Storage_Pre_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "3BA514FE4784552BD4B7049B476EB725", "Now that we have produced our first Building Materials, we can construct a small crate.

Once you have produced at least two units of Building Materials from the Regolith Printer, open Building Mode (B) and navigate to the Storage Category.

Currently you do not have many construction options, but will be able to unlock more options in the near future.

Place a Small Crate within the Core Habitat to continue.")
